title: Letter from a civilian to the Commander of CINDACTA II in Curitiba about UFOs [1993]
excerpt: MARCH 15th, 1993. “Letter from a civilian to the Commander of CINDACTA II in Curitiba, State of Paraná. Subject: Unidentified flying objects. Curitiba, April 9, 1993. To Cindacta II, Av. Mayor Erasto Gaertner, 1000 Curitiba PR Dear Mrs.: On  [erased] at [erased] (dawn of [erased]), with a variation of no more than 00:05 more or […]
text_preview:
MARCH 15th, 1993.

“Letter from a civilian to the Commander of CINDACTA II in Curitiba, State of Paraná. 

Subject: Unidentified flying objects.

Curitiba, April 9, 1993.

To Cindacta II,

Av. Mayor Erasto Gaertner, 1000

Curitiba PR

Dear Mrs.:

On  [erased] at [erased] (dawn of [erased]), with a variation of no more than 00:05 more or less, I was in the north of [erased], in the region of Rio Macuco (Fazenda Macuco), with approximate coordinates of 50 18 30 W and 11 15 00 S, with four more comrades, when, from west to east, a luminous point passed, comparable to the largest visible “stars”.
summary: A civilian letter to CINDACTA II described a fast luminous point and two fully-lit aircraft crossing its trajectory over Fazenda Macuco on March 15, 1993.
